title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Groww Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Groww Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Groww Capital India! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Groww Capital India:
Groww Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Groww Capital India!
